特殊能量：
静质量能=相对动能，上限100点

观测状态：
·施放强化重击、QTE后获得30秒观测状态；
·期间不可恢复耐力
·状态持续时间自然结束时，清空特殊能量
·钩锁、翱翔、使用载具、处于地面状态、处于后台、施放空中攻击下落时，移除该状态。

干涉标记：
·持有观测标记的偏移状态目标受到谐度破坏伤害时，获得8/20秒干涉标记。
·莫宁自身共鸣效率大于100%的部分，每1%使持有干涉标记的目标受到攻击造成的伤害加成+0.25%，至多40%。

被动1：
施放QTE、观测A3后，获得20点协奏能量

延奏：
被下一角色触发延奏后，全队获得0类通用伤害加深25%

·常驻获得1层【集谐干涉上限】

action_comparisons.label: WFO Basic Stage 3
action_comparisons.notes: Passive workbook text grants 20 Concerto after Observation A3.

action_comparisons.label: Optimal Solution
action_comparisons.notes: E1 pre/GP/parry rows are retained as unresolved review rows.

action_comparisons.label: Critical Protocol
action_comparisons.notes: C5 and cinematic/time-stop rows are audit-only and not modeled.

action_comparisons.label: Syntony Field Damage
action_comparisons.notes: Action exists as reviewed optional field damage; automatic scheduling is out of scope.

action_comparisons.label: Intro Convergence
action_comparisons.notes: Implemented incoming transition event; disabled by default through transition config.

action_comparisons.label: Outro Recursion
action_comparisons.notes: Workbook passive text: team all-damage amplification 25% after Outro.

mechanics_audit.mechanic: Rest Mass Energy / Relative Momentum caps
mechanics_audit.source_evidence: Special state row states both special energies cap at 100.
mechanics_audit.current_behavior: characters/mornye.py tracks both resources and clamps to 100.

mechanics_audit.mechanic: Baseline and Wide Field Observation combo routing
mechanics_audit.source_evidence: Basic and Observation A rows provide separate frame/coefficient groups.
mechanics_audit.current_behavior: High-level policy actions resolve into baseline or WFO concrete actions.

mechanics_audit.mechanic: Geopotential Shift enters Wide Field Observation and creates Syntony Field
mechanics_audit.source_evidence: 强化重击 notice grants 30s observation and clears core; field rows describe Syntony Field.
mechanics_audit.current_behavior: Concrete action consumes Rest Mass Energy, enters WFO, and records field duration metadata.
mechanics_audit.recommendation: No gameplay patch from this audit.

mechanics_audit.source_evidence: Field duration and liberation conversion rows are present.
mechanics_audit.current_behavior: Durations are tracked as metadata; automatic field tick scheduling is not implemented.
mechanics_audit.recommendation: Future implementation needs dedicated scheduling design.

mechanics_audit.source_evidence: QTE rows include timing, previous-Outro trigger frame, and observation-state notice.
mechanics_audit.current_behavior: Transition action applies Convergence damage/time and v1 WFO/Syntony effects only when Mornye intro mode is explicitly enabled.
mechanics_audit.recommendation: Do not enable without a transition/QTE behavior task.

mechanics_audit.source_evidence: Special state text states all-team 25% common damage amplification after Outro.
mechanics_audit.current_behavior: Transition config applies a 30s all-damage amp buff and consumes outgoing Concerto.

mechanics_audit.source_evidence: Late source rows describe Tune/Interference behavior.
mechanics_audit.current_behavior: Only placeholder/review action metadata exists where applicable.
mechanics_audit.recommendation: Keep out of source-alignment patch; needs new mechanic design.

mechanics_audit.mechanic: Proof of Boundedness, healing, DEF, defensive survival
mechanics_audit.current_behavior: DPS simulator has no healing/DEF survival model for Mornye.
mechanics_audit.recommendation: Out of scope for audit/source alignment.

mechanics_audit.source_evidence: Passive/special-state rows include non-damage scaling details.
mechanics_audit.current_behavior: Mornye support buff and direct action coefficients are modeled; scaling passives are not.
mechanics_audit.recommendation: Review when team-buff/stat-scaling system is expanded.
